creator: shige@iee.niit.ac.jp
text:
In FreeBSD, dvipdfmx and xdvi use libpaper which is not support JIS B series paper size, which is one of the standard paper size series. JIS B is like a ISO B series, but not the same.
cf. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paper_size#Japanese_B-series_variant

The attached patch may fix the problem. If it not allow to add the patch in print/libpaper, I hope making japanese/libpaper to use the patch.
